brand.tagline: A single space to track the portfolio, contributions and each member's stake — with the rigor of a fund, at the scale of a circle.
brand.datavizLabel: Abstract illustration of a portfolio: valuation curve, allocation and history

form.title: Welcome.
form.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a sign-in link — no password to remember.
form.submittingHint: Preparing your sign-in link, one moment…
form.reassurance: Link valid for 10 min. No password, no spam.

invite.text: First time here? Your club sends you an invitation —

checkEmail.title: Check your inbox
checkEmail.sentTo: We've sent a magic link to {email}. It expires in 10 minutes.

otp.title: Enter the code from the email
otp.hint: The 6-digit code is in the email, below the sign-in button.
otp.errorInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Check the code you entered or request a new email.
otp.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

verify.expiredTitle: This link has expired or is invalid.
verify.expiredBody: Request a new one to sign in.

timeCard.body: We only ask for the essentials to open your space. You can enrich your profile later.

testimonial.tail: what investment clubs have been doing for decades.”
testimonial.author: Lionel ZOCLANCLOUNON

step1.subtitle: A few details for your member profile. They'll be visible to the other members of your club.
step1.avatarHint: Optional · you can add it on the next step

step2.heading: Your photo and contact details.
step2.subtitle: Optional: complete now or later from your profile.

step3.heading: A few agreements before you get started.
step3.subtitle: Two required commitments, a third optional one for the life of the network.
step3.rgpdLabel: I accept the privacy policy and the processing of my personal data.
step3.directoryLabel: I agree to appear in the club's member directory.

slide1.title: Your stake
slide1.body: Track how your stake evolves in real time, with the changes and the valuation of your portfolio.

slide2.title: Your club
slide2.body: Find your club's information, view the shared dashboard and stay up to date on decisions.

slide3.title: The network
slide3.body: Connect with members of the Evolve Capital network and build synergies within the community.

sections.sensitiveHint: Editing these critical fields requires a double confirmation.

hints.city: City where the club is based.
hints.country: ISO 2-letter country code (e.g. FR, BE, LU).
hints.brokerAccountRef: The club's account reference at the broker. Sensitive field.
hints.annualInvestmentCap: Maximum amount investable per year, in euros. Sensitive field.
hints.minContribution: Minimum contribution amount per member, in euros (default 100).

errors.country_invalid: Invalid country code (2 letters expected, e.g. FR).
errors.cap_invalid: Invalid cap (a positive amount is expected).
errors.min_contribution_invalid: Invalid minimum contribution (a positive amount is expected).

sections.title: Legal information
paragraphs: Réseau Evolve Capital — association declared in accordance with the French law of July 1, 1901.
Headquarters: 181 boulevard Macdonald, 75019 Paris, France.
Email: contact@reseauevolvecapital.com
Legal representative: Lionel Zoclanclounon, President of the association.

sections.title: Purpose and spirit of the network
paragraphs: The Evolve Capital network brings its members together around a shared approach to financial education and collective investment. Each member commits to taking part in a spirit of respect, transparency and mutual support.
Membership implies acceptance of the club's operating rules, of this charter and of the privacy policy.

sections.title: Member commitments
paragraphs: Pay contributions according to the terms set by the club and keep personal information up to date.
Respect the confidentiality of information shared within the network and of other members.
Take part in good faith in collective decisions and club activities.

sections.title: Intellectual property
paragraphs: All content made available by the network (structure, presentation, texts, logos, images, videos, sounds, applications) constitutes a work protected by French and international copyright and intellectual property legislation.
Any reproduction, representation, use or adaptation, in any form whatsoever, of all or part of these elements without the prior written agreement of Réseau Evolve Capital is strictly prohibited.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: The information provided is as accurate as possible and regularly updated, but may contain inaccuracies or omissions. If you notice an error, please report it by email, describing the problem as precisely as possible.
The network cannot be held responsible for damage related to the use of the content, nor for the content of third-party sites that links may point to.

sections.title: Applicable law and jurisdiction
paragraphs: This charter and the terms of use are subject to French law. In the event of a dispute relating to their interpretation, execution or termination, the courts of Paris have exclusive jurisdiction.

sections.title: Introduction
paragraphs: At Réseau Evolve Capital, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy informs you about how we handle your data and about your data protection rights.
Our services are intended for individuals interested in investment and finance, and are not intended for children. We do not knowingly collect data relating to children.

sections.title: The data we collect
paragraphs: Identity data: first name, last name, identifier.
Contact data: email address, telephone number, postal address.
Technical data: IP address, login data, browser type and version, time zone, operating system and platform.
Usage data: information about how you use the member area.
Marketing and communications data: your communication preferences, including your presence in the member directory.

sections.title: How we use your data
paragraphs: To manage your membership and your relationship with the club, and to notify you of changes to our terms or this policy.
To give you access to the member area features (dashboard, portfolio, contributions).
To send you, where applicable, the communications you have consented to.
We only use your personal data when the law allows us to.

sections.title: Cookies and similar technologies
paragraphs: We use cookies and similar technologies to remember your preferences (such as the light/dark theme and language) and to ensure the member area works correctly.
Some cookies are essential for authentication: blocking them may prevent access to all or part of the service.

sections.title: Your rights
paragraphs: Request access to your personal data.
Request correction or erasure of your personal data.
Object to processing or request its restriction.
Request the transfer of your personal data.
Withdraw your consent where processing relies on it.

sections.title: Contact
paragraphs: For any questions about this policy or our privacy practices: contact@reseauevolvecapital.com

androidChrome.headline: Keep it within reach.
androidChrome.subline: Install Evolve Capital on your home screen. Open your share in one tap, without the browser.

iosSafari.headline: Your share, always with you.
iosSafari.subline: Add Evolve Capital to your home screen in two steps. We'll show you where to tap.

iosOther.headline: Install Evolve on your home screen.
iosOther.subline: One tap and we open Safari with your session — ready to install from the home screen.

toastCopied.message: Open Safari and paste the link — you'll be signed in automatically.

toastCopiedPlain.title: Address copied

modal.step1Body: Tap the Share icon (↑) in Safari's toolbar.
modal.step2Title: Add Evolve to your home screen
modal.step2Body: In the menu, choose 'Add to Home Screen' (the ⊞ icon). Scroll down a little if you don't see it straight away.
modal.versionNote: Depending on your iPhone version this screen may look slightly different — always look for 'Add to Home Screen'.
modal.firstLoginNote: On first launch, the app will ask for your code once — then you'll stay signed in.

profileSection.title: Install the app on your phone
profileSection.body: Keep Evolve Capital on your home screen — open your share in one tap.

prePrompt.headline: Never miss a vote
prePrompt.subline: Get an alert when a new vote opens or when results are available — even with the app closed.
prePrompt.trustNote: Your vote stays anonymous. Notifications never reveal who voted.

iosInstall.headline: Install the app for notifications.
iosInstall.subline: On iPhone, notifications require adding Evolve Capital to your home screen. We'll show you how.

toastSuccess.title: Notifications on

toastBlocked.title: Notifications blocked
toastBlocked.message: Allow notifications in your browser settings, then try again.

toastDisabled.title: Notifications off
toastDisabled.message: You'll no longer receive notifications on this device.

toastError.title: Something went wrong
toastError.message: An issue occurred. Please try again in a moment.
